sections.title: Intake
missing: treasury_amount_lovelace is missing for a treasury withdrawal
sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Cardano Global Listing Expansion - Powered by Snek
Stated amount: not stated in document

Deliverables: This treasury withdrawal funds the Cardano Global Listing Expansion initiative, a strategic proposal by the Snek Foundation to list SNEK on major centralized exchanges (CEXs), retail brokers, and other widely adopted platforms., SNEK is the largest community token on Cardano, holding the highest market capitalization, over 42,000 wallets, and more than 2 billion ADA in all-time trading volume., Over the past two years, the Snek Foundation has already invested over $4 million, entirely self funded, to secure major exchange listings., We’ve delivered the first and second ever Tier 1 listings for any Cardano native token, with Kraken and Crypto.com setting historic precedents for the ecosystem.

Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): This treasury withdrawal funds the Cardano Global Listing Expansion initiative, a strategic proposal by the Snek Foundation to list SNEK on major centralized exchanges (CEXs), retail brokers, and other widely adopted platforms.

Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, medium materiality): SNEK is the largest community token on Cardano, holding the highest market capitalization, over 42,000 wallets, and more than 2 billion ADA in all-time trading volume.
Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): Over the past two years, the Snek Foundation has already invested over $4 million, entirely self funded, to secure major exchange listings.

Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, low materiality): We’ve delivered the first and second ever Tier 1 listings for any Cardano native token, with Kraken and Crypto.com setting historic precedents for the ecosystem.

Claim (economic, proposer_asserted, low materiality): This proposal aims to address the following challenges: - Lack of exchange presence for Cardano native tokens: Most major centralized exchanges and retail brokers still do not support Cardano Native Tokens (CNTs).
Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, low materiality): This severely limits Cardano’s accessibility and competitiveness on a global scale.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: unsustainable (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds the Cardano Global Listing Expansion initiative, a strategic proposal by the Snek Foundation to list SNEK on major centralized exchanges (CEXs), retail brokers, and other widely adopted platforms." though 8 review blocker(s) remain open.
Strongest NO: an unresolved blocker (treasury_amount_lovelace is missing for a treasury withdrawal) means costs or weak controls may outweigh the claimed benefit.
Strongest hold: a treasury action without a complete deep-research dossier cannot be voted directionally without pretending certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
missing: treasury_amount_lovelace is missing for a treasury withdrawal
sections.conclusion: The vote is only credible if the assessment tree shows enough work for a skeptical delegator to audit.

blocking_questions: treasury_amount_lovelace is missing for a treasury withdrawal
